message:
refactor(daemon): add worker reporting, shared config, rendezvous channels, and simplify parse_proc_mounts

Daemon architecture improvements:

Worker reporting system (loop_main.rs, +68 lines):
- Add WorkerReport enum (ScanCompleted, DeletionCompleted) for
  structured communication from scanner/executor workers back to
  the main monitoring loop, replacing ad-hoc logging
- Add REPORT_CHANNEL_CAP (64) bounded channel for worker→monitor
  results
- Switch scanner channel from bounded(2) to rendezvous (bounded(0))
  so the scanner only accepts work when idle — prevents stale scan
  requests from queueing when the scanner is already busy

Shared configuration (loop_main.rs, policy.rs):
- Add Arc<RwLock<ScoringConfig>> and Arc<RwLock<ScannerConfig>> to
  MonitoringDaemon, enabling hot-reload of scoring/scanner
  parameters without restarting the daemon
- policy.rs: expand policy module with 33 lines of config-reload
  validation and policy-change event emission

Platform simplification (pal.rs):
- Change parse_proc_mounts() from Result<Vec<MountPoint>> to
  Vec<MountPoint> — mount parsing cannot meaningfully fail (malformed
  lines are simply skipped), so the Result wrapper was misleading
- Update all call sites and tests accordingly

Test and code cleanup:
- decision_plane_tests.rs: fix test assertions for updated channel
  semantics
- dual.rs: simplify logger initialization
- guardrails.rs: remove redundant guard condition
- deletion.rs: minor scoring-threshold alignment
- protection.rs: remove 39 lines of dead scaffolding code
- integration_tests.rs, proof_harness.rs: adapt to new APIs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
